\\ch[1,4,Capsule 02, Severance Pods, Pro: \ch[1,4,Capsule 02, Severance Pods, Project Gear, Purification Water, Close]
\"GRANNY: Upon Miera's destruction, the: "GRANNY: Upon Miera's destruction, the people of that region had relocated to a seemingly empty island named Aevium.
As if God itself had answered our prayer: As if God itself had answered our prayers of a safe haven.
Even with a gift from God, I could not l: Even with a gift from God, I could not let go of our past home land.
I became obsessed with finding ways on t: I became obsessed with finding ways on trying to rejuvenate our lost lands.
A woman stuck in the past...
During an expedition, I had come across: During an expedition, I had come across a small structure hidden in a cave.
That was the \"02 Capsule\" as I've dubb: That was the "02 Capsule" as I've dubbed it.
During my inspections, I've come to this: During my inspections, I've come to this conclusion.
The capsule was made by an ancient civil: The capsule was made by an ancient civilization [The Garufans] and was meant to slot itself within a pyramid structure similar to Eclysia.
However, when the pyramid lifted off, a: However, when the pyramid lifted off, a chunk of the underside fallen out and plummeted to Earth.
Within this capsule, I found a conduit t: Within this capsule, I found a conduit that holds \c[6]purification spring water.
This water allowed life to grow, and or: This water allowed life to grow, and or recover at alarming rates.
With this water present, I was given fun: With this water present, I was given funding to create my 'Rejuvenation HQ".
When Aevium of the past came to its end,: When Aevium of the past came to its end, I intended to use the capsule as a bunker for Nastasia and I.
But we unfortunately had never reunited... Then...
Though the capsule was located deep unde: Though the capsule was located deep underneath the HQ building, when Aevium had been reconstructed, the capsule had been raised by the newly formed Mt. Ruin.
I used this knowledge to my advantage an: I used this knowledge to my advantage and used this place for my top secret base of operations..."
\"GRANNY: Madame X's members of Team Xen: "GRANNY: Madame X's members of Team Xen are held captive by her.
The green crystal that adorns the unifor: The green crystal that adorns the uniform of every Xen member is proof of this.
I, along with my daughter, Nastasia, sec: I, along with my daughter, Nastasia, secretly formed a group in charge of slowly saving Team Xen grunts from this captivity.
There are two things that make this proc: There are two things that make this process difficult.
Whenever one becomes a member of Team Xe: Whenever one becomes a member of Team Xen, they are "marked".
\\c[6]This \"mark\" is a small sliver of: \c[6]This "mark" is a small sliver of a \c[6]certain coward's soul.
It's how he maintains himself. It's how: It's how he maintains himself. It's how he tracks you.
Grunts who are seemingly unwilling to ta: Grunts who are seemingly unwilling to take part in Team Xen affairs are then vetting into my HQ building under the guise of "vacation".
During a series of steps, and the final: During a series of steps, and the final meeting via a therapy session, it is decided there whether or not a candidate is qualified.
1.) The grunt must be of lower rank. 2.): 1.) The grunt must be of lower rank. 2.) They must not currently be on a mission. 3.) We must find them trustworthy.
Once this is done, the subject is brough: Once this is done, the subject is brought to our Severance machine, where we look extensively for qualities called "anchors".
Anchors are qualities that tie a person: Anchors are qualities that tie a person physically to Team Xen.
And we simply sever these qualities from: And we simply sever these qualities from their soul.
Many whom we have saved have stayed behi: Many whom we have saved have stayed behind secretly to help me, and many have run away in fear of retaliation.
Do not be mistaken. The ones who run are: Do not be mistaken. The ones who run are not fools. Oh, the contrary...
It is those who stay behind to help that: It is those who stay behind to help that are fools, but... Who are we but human fools in all stages of life?"
\"GRANNY: Though every person that adorn: "GRANNY: Though every person that adorns the green crystal has a sliver of that coward's soul in them--
There is one person, amongst the executi: There is one person, amongst the executives, that holds an extremely high amount of it.
This intrigued both my daughter and I.
We took many opportunities to find a way: We took many opportunities to find a way to get the boy into our Severance machines.
When he took the reigns and lead the war: When he took the reigns and lead the war against Terajuma Island, we took control immediately.
Anastasia ordered many of our grunts to: Anastasia ordered many of our grunts to meet Geara and start the construction of the teleport pad.
Once complete, another one of our operat: Once complete, another one of our operative was to lay low on the island until \PN and crew eventually reached them.
This is the order we gave her.
\"Once Geara is ready to teleport. Withi: "Once Geara is ready to teleport. Within 30 seconds of him disappearing, destroy the telepad."
The teleporter had been rigged to hold G: The teleporter had been rigged to hold Geara within our database here in 02 during those few moments.
Destroying the telepad with Geara inside: Destroying the telepad with Geara inside of our database gave us full reign to tear apart his soul and sever his anchors.
But in order to not arise suspicion, I h: But in order to not arise suspicion, I had to leave the job to my daughter.
It took her some time, but she finally p: It took her some time, but she finally pieced him back together to his "original" self.
Free of the curse of Team Xen.\": Free of the curse of Team Xen."
\"GRANNY: When Aevium suffered its \"dem: "GRANNY: When Aevium suffered its "demise", I waited for my daughter to appear.
It was a coworker that dragged me into C: It was a coworker that dragged me into Capsule 02 during a massive shockwave that tore the land apart.
Unfortunately, my coworker had been thro: Unfortunately, my coworker had been thrown out due to the shock wave and I had been inside Capsule 02 alone.
Due to the reformation of Aevium, the do: Due to the reformation of Aevium, the doors became jammed.
Without food, I was not expected to surv: Without food, I was not expected to survive for long.
However, I never gave up. I took initiat: However, I never gave up. I took initiative and began drinking the purification spring water in microscopic doses.
This is because we've observed that one: This is because we've observed that one organism cannot be healed by the spring water more than twice.
This is because the water itself becomes: This is because the water itself becomes intertwined with the subject's molecules.
Essentially, the water acts as a sort of: Essentially, the water acts as a sort of vaccination against itself.
I suppose a comparison can be made to \": I suppose a comparison can be made to "PokéRus".
If infected and cured once, the Pokémon: If infected and cured once, the Pokémon cannot be infected again.
That aside, ingesting the water in small: That aside, ingesting the water in small doses had positive results.
I had been able to survive for nearly 40: I had been able to survive for nearly 40 years without the need of food.
The water simply handled those needs for: The water simply handled those needs for me.
It seems as though it's had other effect: It seems as though it's had other effects on my health as well...
Although I had grown quite old, I still: Although I had grown quite old, I still looked quite a bit younger than usual.
Make no mistake, I look like no \"spring: Make no mistake, I look like no "spring" chicken, but I did not have the appearance of someone who was in their 80's.
Physical performance wise, it seems as t: Physical performance wise, it seems as though I was as strong as an average 30 year old male.
The spring water holds many mysteries st: The spring water holds many mysteries still. And I intend to unravel each and every one..."
It's a computer that hold's a various am: It's a computer that hold's a various amount of files.
NIM: Okay, it's ready! Please, get insid: NIM: Okay, it's ready! Please, get inside the machine, Maddie!
From what Granny said, it takes three ho: From what Granny said, it takes three hours for this thing to do what it does.
We only have a few minutes.
Who knows? Maybe you're immune while ins: Who knows? Maybe you're immune while inside the machine!
I don't know! Just, I don't want to give: I don't know! Just, I don't want to give up!
MADELIS: Nim, we're out of time...
NIM: This is literally the WORST time!: NIM: This is literally the WORST time!
NIM: Please, just... Don't hate me.
I tried to be friends with you, but you': I tried to be friends with you, but you've always been cold...
I wish it didn't have to come to this.
You were once a treasured friend...
And I'll put you out of your misery!!: And I'll put you out of your misery!!
Ms. Madelis told us it wasn't worth the: Ms. Madelis told us it wasn't worth the effort, but I'm still going to try!
Even if we can't win, I'll make sure to: Even if we can't win, I'll make sure to hurt you!
Ms. Madelis looked sad when she sent me: Ms. Madelis looked sad when she sent me off...
We both knew... She doesn't have any tim: We both knew... She doesn't have any time left.
And y-yet, I still fought, and do you kn: And y-yet, I still fought, and do you know why?!\|
You don't know a thing about it\\^: You don't know a thing about it\^
Madelis is inside. Her fate is unknown.
